name: skill performance feeds the SPACE collector cross-loop integration as an Efficiency signal
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/skills space && printf 'flow-guard:
  latency_p50_ms: 120
  success_rate: 0.92
' > .claude-tdd-pro/skills/perf-stats.yaml && printf 'dimensions: {efficiency_and_flow: {enabled: true}}
share: never
' > space/config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/collector.sh" --metric skill-perf --config space/config.yaml --stats .claude-tdd-pro/skills/perf-stats.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'dimension=efficiency_and_flow' out.txt && grep -q 'source_loop=prompt' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
